description: v1.0.2 — Phase B hooks: research-end retrieval-pack hook and check-gap enumeration for the shared hooks test surface.
changelog:
**Phase B research-end hooks.**
- feat(hooks): Phase B research-end retrieval-pack + check gaps. The `stop` hook (Cursor) / `Stop` hook (Claude) now scans the selected task for research artifacts and smart-search manifests, writes a scored `{TASK}/research/retrieval-pack-latest.json`, and emits a hint citing top ranked items for `verify.md`.
notes: Patch on top of 1.0.1. Run `trellis update` to install the research-end retrieval-pack hook.
